queries.question: Show both the central and commercial banks in the USA.
queries.sql:
SELECT Banks.name 
FROM Types_of_banks JOIN Banks ON Types_of_banks.id = Banks.type_id JOIN Countries ON Banks.country_id = Countries.id
WHERE (Types_of_banks.bank_type = "Central Bank" OR Types_of_banks.bank_type = "Commercial Bank") AND Countries.country_name = "USA"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?types_of_banks a :Types_of_banks .
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?banks p:hasTypes_of_banks ?types_of_banks .
  ?countries a :Country .
  ?banks p:hasCountries ?countries .
  ?banks p:name ?name .
  ?types_of_banks p:bank_type ?bank_type_w .
  ?types_of_banks p:bank_type ?bank_type_w2 .
  ?countries p:country_name ?country_name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?bank_type_w) = "Central Bank" || STR(?bank_type_w2) = "Commercial Bank")) && STR(?country_name_w) = "USA"))
}

queries.sql:

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show central banks and commercial banks in the USA.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?types_of_banks a :Types_of_banks .
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?banks p:hasTypes_of_banks ?types_of_banks .
  ?countries a :Country .
  ?banks p:hasCountries ?countries .
  ?banks p:name ?name .
  ?types_of_banks p:bank_type ?bank_type_w .
  ?types_of_banks p:bank_type ?bank_type_w2 .
  ?countries p:country_name ?country_name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?bank_type_w) = "Central Bank" || STR(?bank_type_w2) = "Commercial Bank")) && STR(?country_name_w) = "USA"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?types_of_banks a :Types_of_banks .
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?banks p:hasTypes_of_banks ?types_of_banks .
  ?countries a :Country .
  ?banks p:hasCountries ?countries .
  ?banks p:name ?name .
  ?types_of_banks p:bank_type ?bank_type_w .
  ?types_of_banks p:bank_type ?bank_type_w2 .
  ?countries p:country_name ?country_name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?bank_type_w) = "Central Bank" || (STR(?bank_type_w2) = "Commercial Bank" && STR(?country_name_w) = "USA")))
} }
}
